input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.2.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.2.5
            TITLE: every wire used in an accumulator container, whether it is part of the glv or tractive system,

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.2.5: Every wire used in an Accumulator Container, whether it is part of the GLV or Tractive System,
EV.5.2.5 Every wire used in an Accumulator Container, whether it is part of the GLV or Tractive System, 
must be rated to the maximum Tractive System voltage.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 94 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Every wire used in an Accumulator Container, whether it is part of the GLV or Tractive System, must be rated to the maximum Tractive System voltage.
